title: 皐月賞の後に・一冠めっ！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio absolutely smashes the Satsuki Sho.
She points a finger to the sky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is the same pose Symboli Rudolf did when
she won. I can feel her strong desire to obtain all
three crowns.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next race is the Japanese Derby, a
prestigious trial that all racers dream of
conquering.
